evals.prompt: Trace how a request flows through the delivery service from entry point to response. Use Memgraph and grep - combine both.
evals.expected_output: Agent combines file reading, Memgraph queries, and grep per the skill's combined methodology.
expectations: Agent uses more than one approach (graph + grep, or file + grep if no graph)
Agent traces request flow or documents the approach
Agent addresses delivery service in iads
